title: ajania shiwogiku var. shiwogiku
intro: Ajania shiwogiku var. shiwogiku, also known as Japanese angelica or Shiwogiku, is a species of perennial herb in the daisy family native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine and Japanese herbalism for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and improving circulation, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Ajania shiwogiku var. shiwogiku is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being added to soups and other culinary dishes.
